programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The top five chefs prepare a unique and elegant small-plate dish in under 45 minutes for people attending a private symphony performance, for which the challenge winner earns a private helicopter tour of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs who prepare the best vegetarian dish win a parasailing experience and a slap up meal. Emotions run high as the hopefuls receive a visit from their friends and family.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The 14th series of Gordon Ramsay's fiercely fought chef challenge concludes. The top two chefs visit previous winner Christina Wilson in Las Vegas for some motivation, before preparing five dishes to be judged by top chefs.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay puts 18 more hopeful chefs through their paces. Will they impress by putting together their signature dishes in just 45 minutes?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants race in the first annual Crepe Grand Prix challenge for the chance to win a luxurious dining experience.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Desperate valg
programme.desc: Fanger på rømmen skapet kaos i Texas, og Walker må stoppe dem og sende dem tilbake til fengselet.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Avledningsgaten
programme.desc: To rivaliserende gjenger samles ved å konkurrere på basketballbanen istedenfor på gata.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Lørdagskveld
programme.desc: Walker trår til når mafiaen tvinger en lokal middagsklubb til å hvitvaske penger.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Rettferdighet for alle
programme.desc: Politiavdelingen skal til å bli saksøkt for vold av en advokat når advokaten blir drept, og Walker etterforsker drapet.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: 6 timer
programme.desc: En skurk planlegger å henrette noen live på nettet, og rangerne må finne ham før han gjennomfører det.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Tanned Triangle
programme.desc: Snooki føler seg fortsatt utstøtt og vurderer å reise sin vei. Første kveld på klubben blir flørtete, så kjærestene hjemme har kanskje grunn til bekymring. Et trekantdrama truer med å splitte huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Good Riddance
programme.desc: Trekanten blir mer intens når Ronnie tar Sammy i å gi nummeret sitt til en annen gutt. En deltaker velger å forlate The Shore for godt.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Destiny's Child, Taylor Hawkins, P.O.D.
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of P.O.D., Destiny's Child and Taylor Hawkins with Chad Smith.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Snoop Dogg, Jeremy Popoff, Silkk The Shocker
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Snoop Dogg, LIT and Silkk the Shocker.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Pamela Anderson, K - CI, Jojo
programme.desc: Starting in sunny Southern California, Cribs pays a visit to Pamela Anderson's spectacular beach-front home.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Moby, Xzibit, Brett Michaels
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Moby, Bret Michaels and Xzibit.

programme.title: Made: Mixed Martial Artists
programme.desc: Sabrina and Jenna are best friends and the biggest girly girls in their school. They want to shed their spoiled images and be MADE into tough, disciplined Mixed Martial Artists.

programme.title: Made: Boxer
programme.desc: Cheerleading princess Erin wants to get tough by becoming a burley boxer. Can boxing trainer Kenny Porter get Erin ready to fight in the showcase of the stars in just 5 weeks?

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Reluctant Dragon
programme.desc: Dr. Cherlotov, a scientist of an enemy power, failed to defect to the West when his wife did. Now that he has developed a cheap, effective anti-ballistic system, the IMF is ordered to get him out.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Frame
programme.desc: Gangster Jack Wellman is moving syndicated crime into politics, killing off certain politicians and replacing them with men more sympathetic to the Syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Diamond
programme.desc: Henrik Durvard has taken over the country of Lombuanada by a military coup, and holds the natives in terror. He has obtained a diamond from the native miners, and the IMF is assigned to take it away from him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Legend
programme.desc: An imprisoned member of the Nazi party, Herbert Raynor, is released from prison and is being flown to Puerto Huberra in South America, along with other Nazis.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Snowball In Hell
programme.desc: A former prison guard, Sefra, has acquired a supply of cesium 138, which explodes at temperatures above 70 degrees.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Kristian drømmer om en diger garasje, og Nathja vil heller bli i Køge – kan Tobias oppfylle drømmene sine?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Maja og Kenneth bor på Vestjylland og drømmer om å komme nærmere familien til Maja i Silkeborg. Men budsjettet deres krever at de går på akkord med beliggenheten og ser i de nærliggende små byene.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Karlstad
programme.desc: Tareq visits sunny Karlstad! Here, food is prepared by Vänern's shores and in Värmland's deep forests. Butter-fried Zander, crepes and cooking over an open fire are on the menu.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of (Part 2)
programme.desc: Once again, Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lund
programme.desc: In this episode, Tareq visits Lund, a thousand-year old city in southern Sweden. Lund is surrounded by the richest farmland in the country, and we explore nearby islands and meet entrepreneurs making highly-regarded local products.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Tareq sails out to Bornholm, a Danish island close to southern tip of Sweden. The islanders are fiercely self-sufficient and this attitude reflects in the huge number of food producers making products that are sold both locally and internationally.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Jokkmokk
programme.desc: Far above the Arctic Circle, Tareq explores the wild country around Jokkmokk. Here, the Sami people lived from what the land provides for thousands of years. This wild cuisine is as extreme as the weather here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, Åland’s shipping fleet was the envy of navies around the world, and their sea trade was encouraged by the seafood, grains and fruits that thrive on these islands. Tareq prepares recipes to reflect Åland’s unique cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö
programme.desc: Tareq is in his hometown of Malmö – Sweden’s third largest city. The food scene here is inspired by the traditional seafood dishes and the large immigrant population whose recipes have given Malmö a new energy.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Finland's South Coast
programme.desc: Tareq takes a late autumn trip along Finland’s southern coast. He stops in the capital Helsinki to see how the city's food culture is about to be discovered by the rest of the world, and dives into the freezing waters around Ekenäs.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: You Will Get Punished Dan
programme.desc: Gjengen er tilbake fra Amsterdam og flesker til i Newcastle. Vicky og Riccci feirer at de bryter Geordie Shore-forbannelsen med en ettårsjubileumsmiddag, men alt er ikke bare idyll.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Here's How To Be A Lady
programme.desc: Spenningen stiger når James tar med kjæresten Kate på en utekveld med gjengen, men Holly lar seg ikke imponere. Huset eksploderer når Vicky og Ricci har en minneverdig krangel, Scott friker ut og Gary og Charlotte tror de er tilbake i Amsterdam.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Let's Take Over Prague
programme.desc: Gjengen er tilbake på sin Gerordie Europa-turné. Nå skal de til Praha for kødd, damer og masse alkohol. Det råder kaos når Gaz blir dritings og gyver løs på Charlotte mens Dan også går på fylla.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Old Habits Return
programme.desc: Kaoset fortsetter når gjengen er tilbake fra Praha. Holly og Kate har en trefning på en utekveld, mens Dan har en trefning med et skinkesmørbrød og kommer i klemma med Scott. Det kan se farlig ut for både Charlotte og Gary og Vicky og Ricci.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Boys Get Their International Wings
programme.desc: Charlotte kommer tilbake akkurat i tide for en tur til Barcelona. Dan fører gutta ut på en fuktig kveld på byen, og med Ricci ute av bildet viser single Vicky vei på en sightsingtour. Og yndlingsgjengen vår bader i sol, sjø, sex og sangria.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: House Party Disaster
programme.desc: Gjengen er tilbake fra Barcelona med Charlottes kjærlighetserklæring til Gary i luften, og Viccy vil ha et oppgjør med Ricci. Diverse militært program og amerikanske festligheter fører til den største krangelen i Geordie Shores historie noen sinne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Dropping Like Flies
programme.desc: Deltakerne sliter med å venne seg til livet uten Vinny, mens Mike konfronterer sine indre demoner. Men det er også Paulys bursdag, og han får sitt livs beste gave!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Vinny
programme.desc: Mike kommer tilbake, bare for å finne ut at Danny har truet med å finne nye medboere! Jentene leier strippere til Pauly og Mikes ville bursdagsfest, og deltakerne reiser til Staten Island for å kidnappe Vinny. Men vil han bli med dem?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Nothing But Nice
programme.desc: Vinny kommer tilbake, og alle feirer. Mike prøver å være hyggelig, men ender opp med å irritere guttene. Snooki sliter med en ubehagelig situasjon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Follow Game
programme.desc: The Situation samler opplysninger for å ødelegge for en av de andre, og for en gangs skyld er det ikke Snooki. JWoww får panikk fordi Roger har forsvunnet og ikke ringer henne tilbake.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Love at the Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Alle deltakerne er konsentrert om sine nåværende kjærester, men det er aldri fred og ro i huset. En av deltakerne skaper drama for The Meatballs, mens Jennis utfordrende klær skaper problemer for Roger.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Sharp Objects
programme.desc: Deltakerne prøver å unngå et haiangrep på fisketur. Jenni konfronterer Paulys stalker. Snooki ser seg ut Vinny da hun blir avvist av kjæresten.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Første hjemmekamp
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys' heiagjeng er i fullt dansemodus og forbereder seg for sesongens første ordinære hjemmekamp. Kelli og Judy vil ha koreografien perfekt og presse jentene med intense øveldser.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: I seriens siste episode, forbereder Dallas Cowboys' heiagjeng seg for entréopptredenen sin - Susan G. Komen Cancer Awareness Halftime Show - under en nasjonalt overført Cowboys' footballkamp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Journey Begins
programme.desc: Drømmer står på spill når uttaket til 2013-2014 Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders innledes. Når portene åpnes og 500 jenter stimer inn, er den spenningen til å ta og føle på. Konkurransen kommer til å være steinhard.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Return of the Vets
programme.desc: Presset er enormt når 54 nye kandidater konkurrerer mot 32 veteraner om en invitasjon til den berømte Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-treningsleiren.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Pressure to Perform
programme.desc: Treningsleiren begynner i Cowboys berømte treningslokaler, Valley Ranch. Det første møtet er fullt av spenning og energi til Kelli kaller inn til spesialmøte med veteranene.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Harsh Reality
programme.desc: "Treningsleirens skumleste kveld" innledes med en dramatisk hendelse når jentene lærer de fryktede hoppspagatene. Det er bare å kjempe seg gjennom for jentene som prøver seg på det berømte og nødvendige trinnet.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Doubt of a Shadow
programme.desc: Newly adopted Shadow starts to exhibit aggressive tendencies towards his family. A professional dog walker needs help with several of her clients.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Anti-Social Sasha
programme.desc: Sasha, a pound pup, is perfect in the house, but outside she shows aggression towards other dogs. Angler, a Lab, is blind, and exhibits strange behavior around food.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bullying Bulldog
programme.desc: Bulldog Buster is prone to biting and growling. Sadie, a 3 month old Beagle/terrier mix, is frightened of trash cans. Lacey develops anxiety at 11 years of age.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy: Red Alert
programme.desc: Pit Bull Buddy, was found chained and starving to death and was very aggressive. Rufus, a Rottweiler/Shar Pei mix, has bitten five people. Both need to get their aggression under control.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: The Dark Side of Chipper
programme.desc: Chipper, a 2-month old Ridgeback/Boxer mix has become progressively more aggressive and has attacked 5 dogs. Two Whippets, Rudy and Monte, are causing issues at their owner’s place of business.

programme.title: MacGyver: Legend Of The Holy Rose-Part II
programme.desc: In their quest for a legendary artifact, MacGyver and archaeologist Zoe Ryan discover the secrets of an ancient utopian society.

programme.title: MacGyver: Second Chance
programme.desc: MacGyver and bounty hunter Jesse Colton search the streets of Bangkok for Colton's illegitimate son, whom they suspect has information concerning stolen medical supplies.

programme.title: MacGyver: Halloween Knights
programme.desc: MacGyver and Murdoc are forced into an uneasy partnership when they must rely on each other's resources in order to rescue a kidnap victim -- Murdoc's sister.

programme.title: MacGyver: Children Of Light
programme.desc: MacGyver helps a dissident Chinese student who is being pursued by Chinese government agents.

programme.title: MacGyver: Black Rhino
programme.desc: After witnessing the grizzly destruction of a black rhino by poachers in Africa, MacGyver joins the fight to save the endangered species from extinction.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Missy and Jase begin to question Reed's choices after he buys an old van to advance his music career; professional grappler Kurt Angle helps prepare River for a competitive wrestling league.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The wives try to spend more quality time with their men by challenging Willie and his brothers to a "frogging" competition; Si and Miss Kay interrupt John Luke and Mary Kate's preparations for college.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie visits a friend in Nashville, Tenn.; new college students John Luke and Mary Kate are dropped off at Liberty University; River enlists the family to help him make a ninja movie.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family throws a party for Willie and Korie's 25th anniversary; Jase blames Uncle Si after he receives a parking ticket.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie asks a local chainsaw artist to make a statue for him; Jep and Jessica attempt to help Kay with her hoarding by selling some of her items online.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Reed proposes to his girlfriend, inspiring Jase to get romantic with Missy; Uncle Si senses a business opportunity when Willie gets recruited to be a guest lecturer at one of Sadie's classes.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase must rid the neighborhood of a pesky beaver; Willie and Si argue over which of them makes the better driving instructor after Little Will receives his learner's permit.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and Phil's disagreement over whether humans in a duck blind can be spotted from the air leads Jep to purchase a drone; Si visits the chiropractor for a spinal adjustment.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie hires Alan to work at Duck Commander, but his big brother becomes a control freak and wears out his welcome; the women practice their self-defense techniques on John Luke.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The crew uses crafty driving skills to follow a truck that is driving to the home of an elusive lawbreaker.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Concerned over a puppy's injuries, Dog has a change of heart and decides to give a meth addict a second chance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog helps out two bondsmen buddies whose clients are wanted on charges of drug possession and massive traffic offenses.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på trynet i gresset idet de 'Eter plen', blir veltrent og hårete med muskelforbundne 'Gymhunder' og går langt under null i 'Dypfryst moro'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en fare for seg selv i 'Selvfelling', drar på gymet for å få seg en 'Boksesekktrøkk' og går langt i å utfordre høydeskrekken med 'Elleville høyder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjør Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en smidig sorti over 'Sikkerhetsgjerder', trenger å rense bilinteriøret i 'Bil-kryp' og tester chuggekapasiteten i 'Styrterekyl'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne 'Ridiculousness' har Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med en spesiell gjest, Dee Snider, og møter rebeller i 'Tenker ikke å tåle det', opplever band som sliter i 'Kommer ikke til å slå gjennom' og blir nedstemt av spilt kaffe i 'Kaffetragedier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på konsekvensene ved å overse skilt i 'Skiltblind', lærer om merkelige ting som er 'Teknisk sett sant' og finner ut hvordan sprø ting blir 'Sprøere og sprøere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood syklister få seg en overraskelse i 'Uventede sykkelhinder', møter ondskapsfulle katter som viser 'Kattevrede' før de tar en titt på folk som setter hodet fast i 'Skallefeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg på 'Kostymekatastrofer', kommer i kontakt med 'Etikettefjerne folk' og blir vitner til 'Nære på-overganger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood se folk som snus opp ned av 'Påtvungne overslag', får seg en drink og to for mye med 'Pussa bestemødre' og finner ut grunnen til å unngå dansing med drinker i 'Ikke drikk og dans'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' med Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah får vi se strålende treffsikkerhet i 'Skallesnikskyting', finner ut av hva som er motsatt av å prestere under press i 'Vanære under press' og avslutter med noen 'Sjalu hjerter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' drar Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood for å skate med gjenstander på hjul som er 'Park-uforenlig', tar bilder og får seg en smell i 'Knipseattakk' og holder fast på verdisakene i møte med 'Mobile skurker'.

programme.desc: Det viser seg at Doyle er en android bygget av Harper for å inneholde Rommies kjerneprogrammering.

programme.title: Andromeda: Eschatologi av vår nåtid
programme.desc: Beka vinner en pris fra en radio-DJ, lærer sannheten om Seefra og finner Meethus-diagrammet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Når går rundt ...
programme.desc: En forsker fra det opprinnelige Commonwealth dukker opp, fanget i en tidssløyfe.

programme.title: Andromeda: Forsøk på avrettingsmasse
programme.desc: Flavin kommer tilbake og utløser en gjengkrig og hjelper Dylan til å utvikle seg som et paradin.

programme.title: Andromeda: Så brenn de utemmede landene
programme.desc: En krystall som kan gjenopprette Andromedas kraft blir oppdaget, men for å få den, må Dylan jobbe for gruveeieren.

programme.title: Andromeda: Det som ikke var
programme.desc: Tunneler oppdages på Seefra som kan brukes til å nå åtte andre Seefra-planeter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss, Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 19
programme.desc: This episode includes: Getaway Photo & UD, Looking for Angeline & UD, UD: Nine Lives, and Mom & Pop Murders (Pts. 1 & 2 + UD).

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 20
programme.desc: This episode includes: Magnetic Attraction (Pts. 1 & 2 + UD), Oregon Heir, UD: The Man Who Never Was, and UD: Money Clip Murder.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 21
programme.desc: This episode includes: Slain Swedes, UD: Amelia Earhart 2, Black Market Babies, Bones Knows, UD: Prison Mom, and Med Scam & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 22
programme.desc: This episode includes: Noah's Ark, New in Town & UD, Model A Sister & UD, and Carwash Kidnap & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 23
programme.desc: This episode includes: World Leaders, Marie Hilley, Experts/Walker, and Women in the Bay & UD.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Shreds of Evidence
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Drawing Conclusions
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written in Blood
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Wasted Youth
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Crimes Of Passion
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Blackpool Pleasure Beach
programme.desc: Blackpool Pleasure Beach is one of the most visited attractions in the United Kingdom. People visit it not only for the fun, but to also hopefully catch a glimpse of the many ghosts that haunt there.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Forgotten Souls of Errwood Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to the Errwood Hall ruins in the Goyt Valley. It is said to be haunted by 3 spirits, and that it has its very own time slip. The investigation does not disappoint and although the hall is gone, the spirits remain.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghost in the Shower
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Waterloo Rugby Club and come into contact with a very mischievous spirit in the male showers! A ghost that scares away any female that dares to enter.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Drakelow Tunnels
programme.desc: The Drakelow Tunnels are a former underground military complexused mainly for storage. However, during the construction and running of this facility, 6 people are thought to have died.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Mischievous Ghost of The Kings Arms Hotel
programme.desc: Sean investigates claims that a mischievous ghost going by the name of Alice is causing havoc at The Kings Arms Hotel. This is one night at a hotel that the team will not rest.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed 5 Times?
programme.desc: Did Everett touch his girlfriend Michelle’s daughter? Her ex Robert says that his 7-year-old daughter said so. Everett will take a lie detector test to disprove it! Don’t miss these shocking results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am
programme.desc: Sean says his wife has made him so angry that he’s put her in the hospital over 10 times. Sean’s also got a secret of his own — he is really a she! Can Steve help Sean iron out his issues?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Real Teens: Real Topics
programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off limits!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Rescues a Runaway
programme.desc: Sherry was attacked at 15 and ran away from home. She wants Steve’s help with reuniting her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and unstable father Nick.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shot Through the Heart
programme.desc: 15yr old Chuck returns home from school to find his mother, Betty Limbrick, shot dead on the floor. Evidence points to a robbery gone wrong, but Kenda uncovers a plot almost too shocking to believe.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Victim Zero
programme.desc: A brawl erupts at a local bar ends with the shooting death of a army solider. To unravel the murder, Lt. Joe Kenda most infiltrate a revered military institution, and expose a dangerous vendetta.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Now Pronounce You Dead
programme.desc: Mother of 3 Dianne Hood is shot to death by a masked gunman on her way home from a Lupus support meeting. Joe Kenda uncovers a sordid web of lust and greed, revealing a killer no one ever expected.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Folie Aux Deux
programme.desc: On the outside, the beautiful Hopkins sisters seem to have the perfect life. But under the surface lurks a devastating disease that will lead the twins down a path of destruction.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Do No Harm
programme.desc: Twin pediatricians, the Blankenburgs, harbor dark secrets that no one can believe. And just 300 miles north, the teenage Samel twins, commit a crime that will shock their neighborhood for decades.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Fatal Fraternity
programme.desc: Identical twins Wasel and Wael Ali were obsessed with power from an early age. Using false identities they torment unsuspecting people until they become victims of their own game.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Gann Twins
programme.desc: Identical twins Jordan and Simon Gann had potential in their youth. But as teens they take an inexplicable dark turn launching a global crime spree.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: From the moment they are born identical twins, Yvette and Doris Gay, are a close-knit pair. But when they meet a married man the quiet duo transforms into a dangerous threesome.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: As each lead turns cold in a gruesome murder case, Dr. G worries justice may never be served. As the autopsy draws to an end, Dr. G uncovers a shocking clue that may solve this crime.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Final Session at Galleries of Justice
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travel back in time to The Galleries of Justice in Nottingham. This was a one stop shop for justice where criminals were held awaiting trial.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Underground World Of The City of Caves
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team ventures underground to investigate the City of Caves in Nottingham.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Strange Killing of Ken Rex McElroy
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane explore the gripping tale of justice, mystery and community in Ken Rex McElroy's demise.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Scandalous Murder of William Desmond Taylor
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane untangle a web of Hollywood's secrets in the scandalous murder of William Desmond Taylor.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Extraordinary Disappearance of Louis Le Prince
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane cover the disappearance of a man who stepped onto a train only to never be seen again.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Disturbing Mystery of the Jamison Family
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane discuss the mystery of the Jamison family, who vanished in the woods under odd circumstances.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Sinister Disappearance of Jimmy Hoffa
programme.desc: Delve into the case of Jimmy Hoffa as Ryan and Shane investigate the mystery of this prominent mob figure.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Bizarre Collar Bomb Bank Robbery
programme.desc: Join Ryan and Shane as they discuss the bizarre collar bomb incident and the details that still remain murky.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Headless Nun
programme.desc: Når Sydneys fly krasjer, blir hun bedt av en gruppe nonner om å finne hodet til en annen nonne som ble halshogd for flere århundrer siden.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Smoking Gun
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel søker etter Al Capones diamantkledde pistol på oppdrag fra en mann som håper det vil fjerne bestefaren for et drap han var innrammet for.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Affaire de Coeur
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Skottland for å finne den andre ringen av paret Twining Rings of Calum og Elena.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dobbel helix
programme.desc: Andromeda blir involvert i en strid mellom en enn planeten og en Nietzschean-koloni.

programme.title: Andromeda: Angel Dark, Demon Bright
programme.desc: En slipstream sender Andromeda tilbake i tid til like før Commonwealth faller. Mannskapet må gripe inn for å bevare historien

programme.title: Andromeda: Slipsene som blinder
programme.desc: Besvarelse av et nødanrop fører til at mannskapet henter Bekas bror, nå en Wayist, og hans venn.

programme.title: On the Case: A Knock on the Door
programme.desc: A beautiful young mother is found murdered in the bedroom of her home. The only witness was her five year old son. Would he be able to help police solve the crime?

programme.title: On the Case: A Wave Goodbye
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl is discovered murdered at an empty campground, located more than 50 miles from where she was last sighted.

programme.title: On the Case: Ring of Truth
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is discovered high in the San Bernardino Mountains, detectives must figure out who she was and how she got there before they can catch the cold blooded killer who murdered her.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Paper Trail
programme.desc: The police follow a trail of emails, hoping it will lead them to a 38-year-old woman's vicious killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Secrets From The Grave
programme.desc: After a teenager's partially nude body is discovered brutally beaten in a desolate cemetery, Investigators and her family face an emotional journey to the truth behind her murder

programme.title: On the Case: A Tangled Past
programme.desc: When a daughter investigates her sick mother's death, she begins to wonder if the cause of her untimely end was really murder.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Sheryl Underwood, Drew's News
programme.desc: "The Talk" co-host Sheryl Underwood is joining Drew and talking all about dating! Drew and Ross Mathews are covering the latest headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Stephanie Izard, Eve Rodsky, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics. Stephanie Izard is joining Drew in the kitchen to make something delicious. Eve Rodsky is sharing home equity tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Melissa Rivers, Law Roach, Christian Siriano
programme.desc: We're celebrating the Oscars and style sheriffs Melissa Rivers, Law Roach and Christian Siriano are joining Drew and Ross Mathews for a special fashion panel.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Kevin Frazier and Nischelle Turner
programme.desc: Entertainment Tonight's Kevin Frazier and Nischelle Turner are joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk for a special Oscars themed Drew's News, sharing their predictions for the awards show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Eva Longoria, Drew's News with Lewis Howes
programme.desc: Actress Eva Longoria is joining Drew in the kitchen and they're cooking up Spaghetti Alle Vongole. Best-selling author Lewis Howes joins Drew and Ross Mathewsat the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Dylan Mulvaney
programme.desc: A year ago, actress Dylan Mulvaney publicly came out as a trans woman for the first time and began documenting her transition in her Tik-Tok series "Days of Girlhood," that now has over a billion views.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: "Drewber" with Courteney Cox and Melissa Barrera, Drew's News with Tony Dokoupil
programme.desc: "Scream VI" stars Courteney Cox and Melissa Barrera are joining Drew in an all-new Drewber. Plus, "CBS Mornings" Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Tamar Adler, Tony Dokoupil
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to hit the headlines! James Beard Award-winning author Tamar Adler joins Drew andTonyDokoupil in the kitchen to serve up something delicious.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Kerry Washington, Tracy McMillan
programme.desc: Kerry Washington stars in an all-new comedy show, 'UnPrisoned' by creator Tracy McMillan, and they're joining Drew to dish all about the new series.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Kerry Washington, Danny Seo, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew-crew member Danny Seo is back and sharing professional laundry tips with Drew andKerry Washington, including how to get makeup stains out of sheets.Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Paris Hilton, Michelle Miller, Drew's News

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Ronnie Woo, Drew's News

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death on Valentine's Day

programme.title: 48 Hours: Stalked: Out of the Shadows - Part 1
programme.desc: A two-part investigation into stalking -- the victims, the stalkers, the dangers and the long-term psychological damage this torment causes. Includes a report on the stalking death of singer Christina Grimmie.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Last Chance for Freedom
programme.desc: A report on Crosley Green, who in 1990 was convicted of the murder of Charles "Chip" Flynn and sentenced to death. Green has spent the last 26 years, with help from lawyers and private investigators, trying to prove his innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in the O.C.
programme.desc: A report on the 1994 murder of millionaire businessman Bill McLaughlin in his California home. After his divorce, he became involved with the much younger Nanette Johnston, who it was later discovered, made a habit of seeking out wealthy men to date.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dangerous Beauty
programme.desc: A report on the 2003 murder of Russel Douglas on Whidbey Island, Washington, and how the investigation led to the involvement of Peggy Sue Thomas, a one-time Washington beauty queen-turned-high-end limo driver.

programme.title: Cops: Poolwatch
programme.desc: Deputies taser a man who almost ran over a deputy with his truck. A man gives police false information after saving a boy who fell into a pool. A woman tries to buy drugs from an undercover officer.

programme.title: Cops: Gimme a Break
programme.desc: Officers pursue two brothers after an attempted bank robbery. A confused man with a shotgun calls police after hearing voices. Deputies find illegal items in the back of a man's truck.

programme.title: Cops: Table for Two
programme.desc: Police respond to an emergency call and find a man in dire trouble. Deputies respond to an abusive husband at a local eatery. Two women try to buy narcotics from an undercover deputy during a sting.

programme.title: Cops: Candlelight Burglar
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a fight between a daughter's boyfriend and her mother. A woman lights candles after an attempted break-in. Police respond when an evicted tenant tries to reenter his old apartment.

programme.title: Cops: The Car is Mine!
programme.desc: A man locks himself in a trunk after deputies respond to a restraining order call. Deputies respond to two women arguing over the ownership of a car.

programme.title: Cops: Bike for Sale
programme.desc: A deputy pursues a man who fled from a traffic stop. A deputy chases a suspicious man leaving an apartment complex. Two men claim they are trying sell a bike during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops: She Needed a Nap
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a man involved in a carjacking. Deputies are called to an altercation between a father and son. Officers respond to an unresponsive woman lying in a roadway.

programme.title: Cops: Mamma's House
programme.desc: Deputies search for a man who ran from a traffic stop. A man being pursued tells officers he was going to his mother's house. A drunk driver won't admit to hitting a car.

programme.title: Cops: Mean Girls Times Two
programme.desc: Deputies are forced to taser a man after pursuing him into a field. A driver plays dumb when asked about the revolver under his car seat. Officers respond to two teenage girls in a fight.

programme.title: Cops: Backseat Denial
programme.desc: An officer struggles with a man reaching for something in his pocket. A man won't cop to the gun in his backseat. Police arrive on the scene when a man threatens to shoot his wife.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Julein Thevenet Case
programme.desc: On January 27th 2014, in Somme-Suippe in the Marne, Sophie Thevenet discovers her dead husband's body in the garage.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Raphael Lomoro Case
programme.desc: On June 12th 2007, in Berhen-lès-Forbach, in Moselle, a young woman reports the disappearance of her brother Raphaël Lomoro, 46 years old vanilla producer living in Madagascar.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Key to the Enigma (Farid Ouzzane Case)
programme.desc: On July 13, 2011, two boaters retrieved a suitcase that was floating in the bay of Lorient. Inside, they discovered the tied up corpse of a man. In order to identify this unknown man, whose face was unrecognizable.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Corpse In The Cemetery: The Frederic Butanowicz Case
programme.desc: On November 9, 2011, the body of a man was found near the Courcelles-le-Comte cemetery (Pas-de-Calais).

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 704
programme.desc: En sommernatt i Värmland bryter det ut slagsmål, hvoretter 21 år gamle Harout mottar et dødelig knivstikk. Politiet får mistanker om at et sjalusidrama kan være nøkkelen til å finne den skyldige.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 504
programme.desc: En sommernatt i 2001 er Gunn Merete Lode på vei hjem etter et venninnetreff i Bryne. I nabolaget sitt blir hun overfalt av en ukjent mann. Situasjonen bli observert av 17 år gamle Øyvind.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 702
programme.desc: Ekteparet Suzanne og Lars lever et stille og rolig liv på landet utenfor Stockholm. Men når Suzanne avlyser en viktig tenniskamp på kort varsel, blir hennes tennispartner mistenksom og varsler politiet.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Da 32 år gamle Memo plutselig forsvinner, tar vennene hans saken i egne hender og begynner å lete desperat etter ham. Bekymringen forvandles til frykt når letingen fører til urovekkende oppdagelser.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Natt til 13. februar 2023 rystes den lille bygda Malå i Nord-Sverige av et brutalt angrep. Etter hvert som politiet begynner å nøste opp i saken, dukker det opp mørke hemmeligheter og mistanker mot uventede personer.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Children's Story
programme.desc: Catherine learns that the city's model foster home for children is hiding a dark secret.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: An Impossible Silence
programme.desc: When she witnesses a shooting, a deaf girl must decide whether to abandon the sanctuary of the City Below to free an innocent man.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Shades of Grey
programme.desc: Mouse makes his first appearance - and is quickly shunned by the Family of tunnel folk for thievery.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: China Moon
programme.desc: Vincent and Catherine help a Chinatown beauty avoid an arranged marriage by escaping into the underground.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Alchemist
programme.desc: Catherine has reason to believe that a new drug on the streets is being supplied by someone from Vincent's world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trunk
programme.desc: A young man at a motel discovers an empty trunk that grants any wishes. He uses it for popularity, but at a party he discovers who his true friends are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Appointment on route 17
programme.desc: After finishing a heart transplant, a man finds his personality has changed. He also discovers that he has a strange attraction to a waitress at a road diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Cold Equations
programme.desc: A rescue pilot on the frontiers of space is faced with unpleasant prospects when he finds an innocent stowaway on his ship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: It's a Good Life
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Deaths-Head Revisited
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Midnight Sun
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Still Valley
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Stranger in Possum Meadows
programme.desc: A young boy playing in a field meets an old man who is really an alien collecting specimens to bring back to his planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Street of Shadows
programme.desc: While taking a walk in a wealthy neighborhood, an unemployed man living in a shelter experiences an unusual transformation

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Something in the Walls
programme.desc: A doctor arrives at his new job in a sanitarium. He discovers the case of a woman who is terribly frightened of things that appear on her walls.

programme.title: JAG: Coming Home
programme.desc: A marine’s killing in Iraq has ramifications for JAG stateside as Harm helps the soldier’s family with a media onslaught, and Bud and Mac investigate the failure of his flack vest.

programme.title: JAG: Fighting Words
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: JAG: Retrial
programme.desc: At the request of Seaman Saul Wainright (guest star William Sadler), who is serving a life sentence in a federal prison for stabbing a transsexual prostitute 20 years ago, Harm convinces Naval authorities to re-open the case.

programme.title: JAG: One Big Boat
programme.desc: When a Naval Academy sailing team gets caught in a squall and a team member drowns, Mac and Turner must determine if their driven commander willingly put his crew at risk.

programme.title: JAG: Fit For Duty
programme.desc: Harm and Mac find themselves on opposing sides when a Navy psychiatrist is charged with allegedly sending a marine diagnosed with combat stress back to battle too soon.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: Potsie Quits School
programme.desc: When troubles with his studies and an insulting professor cause Potsie to quit school, the Fonz comes up with an ingenious but offbeat plan to help his friend.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 1)
programme.desc: In Part I, Fonzie is called to make emergency mechanical repairs on a stalled hearse and inadvertently discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money hidden in the coffin.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Duel
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Gets Shot
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: Happy Days: Grandma Nussbaum
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: Happy Days: A Night at the Circus
programme.desc: Howard's teen-aged niece, K.C., comes to stay with the Cunninghams after a scandal closes her Houston boarding school while Fonzie hopes a night at the circus will help him win little Heather's heart when nothing else seems to work.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Aftermath
programme.desc: In WWII's final months, Allies discover Nazi death camps, prompting a sweeping denazification of Germany post-war. Nuremberg trials convict top Nazis. Former Nazis are employed by the West in the Cold War struggle against the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Today’s infantry demands a weapon combining machine gun firepower with rifle accuracy and mobility.. Host Wil Willis traces this journey through iconic firearms.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Special Forces operate deep behind enemy lines with top-of-the-line weapons.Host Wil Willis tests the Sig Sauer P226, the preferred choice like the Mark 25 by Navy SEALs, against competitors like the H&K Compact Tactical.

programme.title: Secret War: The Scholar and the Fight for Greece
programme.desc: Monty Woodhouse, a professor and a legend for blowing up the Gorgopotamos Bridge in Greece in 1942. In the British counter attack against Rommell at Al Alamein in North Africa it was vital to disrupt German supply routes, Greece.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Seizing Power
programme.desc: In 1930s Germany, Hitler capitalizes on economic woes blaming the Weimar Government and Jews. Despite scandals, Nazi rallies gain popularity and emerge as the largest party. Hitler becomes Chancellor in 1933, using the 'Enabling Act' to seize power.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: En dag jeg vil angre
programme.desc: Spencer redder livet til hovedsangeren i The Plain White T's og får ham til å gå med på å delta i iCarly. Merkelige ting begynner å gå feil midt i Carlys, Sams og Freddies nettvideosending.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjensittingen
programme.desc: Sam må sitte igjen den kvelden iCarly holder sin 50. nettvideospesialsending. Carly og Freddie kan da altså ikke gjøre som de pleier, så de prøver så godt de kan å få gjennsitting de også, så de kan sende fra skolebenken med Sam.

programme.title: iCarly: Fotsår reklame
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie blir invitert til Dakas hovedkvarter, der de blir tilbudt en stor pengesum får å gå god for Dakas nye sko, Tech-foten, på iCarly. Men det viser seg at skoene er forferdelige.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg lover å ikke sladre
programme.desc: Carly får en B på historieprøven hun burde ha fått en A på. Sam, som griper sjansen på sitt ukentlige møte med rektor Franklin, forandrer Carlys karakter på datamaskinen og overrasker henne med A blank.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly redder TV
programme.desc: En prestisjetung produsent vil gjøre iCarly om til et TV-show. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie blir raskt fortvilet når de hører om alle de store forandringene produsenten ønsker å foreta.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg hater Sams kjæreste
programme.desc: Sam får en kjæreste og de to blir uadskillelige. Men når forholdet begynner å få følger for iCarly, forstår Carly og Freddie at de må gjøre noe.

programme.title: iCarly: Overvåket
programme.desc: Etter å ha sett et klipp på iCarly der en mann selger illegale piratkopivideoer, bestemmer to detektiver seg for å bruke Carly og Spencers loft for overvåking.

programme.title: iCarly: Skolebytte
programme.desc: Carly får vite at hun får mulighet til å få et fullt stipend til en privat eliteskole pga nettshowet sitt. Skolen er Briarwood. Carly er i sterk tvil, men Sam og Freddie vet de må få henne til å gå for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Fektedrama
programme.desc: Freddie trenger litt guttetid, så han slår seg sammen med Spencer for å dra og fekte. Freddie er et naturtalent, men ting blir innviklet når Spencer får ham med i en kamp mot den utrolige Doug Toder.

programme.title: iCarly: Vinn en date
programme.desc: Når vennen deres Gibby er for sjenert for å be ut jenta han liker, bestemmer gjengen seg for å gjøre ham og hans flamme til deltagere i et "iWin A Date" innslag på nettvideoshowet deres

programme.desc: A charter flight falls through the cracks after the McBryans attend a wild family wedding, and an irate Joe pulls captain Justin from the Turkey test flights to do the job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Suspension
programme.desc: A furious Joe fights against a federal suspension that will prevent him from carrying passengers for the first time in 20 years. It's also a setback for Jeremy and the other rampies, which takes a turn for the worse with an unexpected injury.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sex Detective
programme.desc: En respektert kriminalbetjent, ekspert i sexforbrytelser, benytter ukonvensjonelle metoder for å løse en sak, en actionhelt redder kjæresten sin og en ansatt i en butikk med yoghurt-is tester for mange vareprøver.

programme.title: Key & Peele: I'm Retired
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en ungkars-fest som blir underlig og en svart fyr med en hvit penis.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Joke Stealing
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en fotballspiller som blir straffet for å juble for mye, Jordan og Keegan som går på premieren på "Othello" og en high school-elev som blir berømt for å stjele en vits.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sex Addict Wendel
programme.desc: Artister blir sparket i skrittet på grunn av kunsten sin, klassens klovn terroriserer læreren og en mann prøver å få hellet med seg på et møte for sexmisbrukere.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East Bowl Rap / West Bowl Rap
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer All-Stars fra East/West bowl som rapper, karene spiller mafioso og de to parkeringstypene har vanskelig for å tro at noen tør å provosere Batmans.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Flicker
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan har en flickerkamp og en MMA-fighter går for langt når han erter motstanderen. Andre sketsjer inkluderer en bryllupsgjest somvil være dj og spille "klassiske" låter.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Terrible Henchman
programme.desc: En nødsituasjon tvinger en mann til å endre morgenritualet sitt, en medforbryter ødelegger for superskurken og Jordan minner Keegan på at han er voksen nå.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Dubstep
programme.desc: President Obama og hans vredeoversetter, Luther, taler til Mitt Romney, vi møter mannen som skulle holde tale etter Martin Luther Kings 'I Have A Dream'-tale, og to venner prater om hva som skjer med bæsjen deres atter at de skyller ned.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bitch
programme.desc: I denne seriepremierer av komiprogrammet prøver Jordan Peele og Keegan Michael Key å si et forbudt ord om deres kvinner, Lil Wayne venner seg til livet bak lås og slå, og president Obama uttrykker hva han egentlig føler.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Dueling Magical Negroes
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan spiller to mystikere som kjemper om rettigheten til å gi skarpsindige råd. Andre sketsjer inkluderer Jaden Smith og hans agent som diskuterer et nytt manuskript, og et homsepar som 'feirer' ny lovgivning.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Severed Head Showcase
programme.desc: En gospel-gruppe må øve uten læreren sin, en gjeng krigere feirer en halshugning, en fange prøver å narre fengselsvakten og en ung mann blir konfrontert fordi han bare snakker i floskler.

programme.title: Broad City: In Heat
programme.desc: Ilana leter febrilsk etter en gave i siste øyeblikk til Lincoln, mens Abbi prøver å finne et klimaanlegg for å få det kjølig på soveværelset.

programme.title: Broad City: Mochalatta Chills
programme.desc: Der dukker opp nye muligheter når Abbi endelig kan trene noen på Soulstice og Ilana gjør suksess som firmasjef.

programme.title: Broad City: Wisdom Teeth
programme.desc: Abbi skal trekke visdomstennene og Ilana ser det som sin plikt å passe henne til hun får det bedre - noe som selvfølgelig innebærer en masse 'medikamenter' og en total mangel på tilsyn.

programme.title: Broad City: Knockoffs
programme.desc: Abbi og Jeremy går på en date som ender med en overraskelse. Ilana og hennes mor leter etter den perfekte håndvesken.

programme.title: Broad City: Hashtag FOMO
programme.desc: Jentene leter etter den perfekte fest, noe som avslører en underlig og surrealistisk side av Abbi, som igjen bekrefter Ilanas verste anelser.

programme.title: Broad City: Citizen Ship
programme.desc: Gjengen skal feire at Jaime har blitt amerikansk statsborger, men Bevers fører Abbi og Ilana på avveier med å love dem gratis sprit. Imens må Lincoln og Jaime klare seg selv blandt alle advokatene.

programme.title: Broad City: Coat Check
programme.desc: Abbi prøver å finne en forsvunnet frakk, mens Ilana utforsker en ny romanse - som føles merkelig kjent.

programme.title: Broad City: St. Mark's
programme.desc: Når jentene feirer Ilanas 23. fødselsdag, blir de avbrudt av en rømt tenåring som fører dem ut på en vill jakt rundt i St. Mark's Place.

programme.title: Broad City: Two Chainz
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana opplever store klesuhell på vei til en venns utstilling og legger ut på en desperat jakt etter et offentlig toalett.

programme.title: Broad City: Co-Op
programme.desc: Abbi må late som om hun er Ilana for å ta hennes skift på jobben, mens Ilana drar til Long Island pga en svært viktig legetime.

programme.title: Broad City: Game Over
programme.desc: Ilana får en ny mulighet på Deals, Deals, Deals, og Abbi prøver å holde konkurranseinstinktet i sjakk på Soulstice Games Day.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel's Pregnant
programme.desc: Did Dangle and Garcia freeze to death? Did Wiegel's serial killer husband get lethally injected? What is Carrot Top doing in Reno, and why is he so mad?

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Junior Bros.
programme.desc: While Garcia goes undercover to bust undocumented workers and the people who hire them, Junior spends his day off with his brothers.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Jet Ski Blues
programme.desc: The Reno Sheriff's Department inherits a beautiful, cursed jet ski from a fallen deputy.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Rick's On It
programme.desc: Rick the Citizens' Patrolman one-ups the Sheriff's Department in investigating a crime spree, and Garcia receives a visit from an old, unpredictable friend.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Spanish Mike Comes Back
programme.desc: Spanish Mike Alvarez returns to tempt the deputies, and Jones and Garcia work security at a Ted Nugent concert.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Son of a Chechekevitch
programme.desc: The deputies vow to avenge Sheriff Chechekevitch's death, and Wiegel studies with Lamaze instructor Guy Gerricault.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Investigation Continues

programme.title: RENO 911!: Corporate Sponsor
programme.desc: Hotty's Restaurants sponsors the Reno Sheriff's Department, and the gang gets burned by the deal.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Christian Karaoke Singles' Mixer
programme.desc: Clemmy scandalizes Kimball's Christian singles karaoke club, and Dangle takes bets on the origins of Wiegel's baby.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Proposition C
programme.desc: As Williams and Wiegel consider tampering with the vote for deputies' raises, Jones and Garcia tangle with a drug dealer who may be a D.E.A. agent.

programme.desc: Dave gets Oprah pregnant and recalls being a member of the O.J. Simpson trial jury.

programme.desc: P. Diddy gives unusual requests, and Snoop Dogg visits Kneehigh Park; appearances by Q-Tip and Wyclef Jean.

programme.desc: A blind white supremacist unleashes hate, and Dave unveils Nat King Cole's booty videos.

programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Security Officer Jay
programme.desc: Daniel klikker over Movember, ønsker å rense seg selv og en vekter får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Happy Birthday, Katie
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper en snill fyr å være mer enn bare en venn, gjør narr av rike idioter på Instagram og avslører resultatene av AIDS-testen sin.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Bad Impressions
programme.desc: Daniel gjør Thanksgiving ekstra queer, gir deg muligheten til å få din egen del av Tosh Empire, og gir en elendig imitator oppreisning.

programme.desc: Daniel finner opp et spill som får Hasbros Parker Brothers til å skjelve av frykt, viser et julekort som er garantert ødelegger julen, og USAs favoritt-analjente får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Weirdoes of the Year; Fan Christmas Cards
programme.desc: Daniel viser sine favorittklipp av årets gærninger, og åpner julekort fra fansen.

programme.desc: Daniel gjeninnfører 'Sport eller konsekvens', finner ut av mysteriet om hvem hans far er, og viser den mest sexy nettoppreisningen noensinne.

programme.title: Tosh.0: IceJJFish
programme.desc: Daniel går på date, gir bort bilen sin, og sangeren med fløyelsstemmen IceJJFish får sin nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Take No Orders
programme.desc: Daniel prøver å gjøre alle hjem i USA til offentlige toaletter, har en utfordring som sensuren vil hate og fyren som ikke tar ordre fra kvinner får oppreisning.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a dream come true for Tony when he’s challenged by an aging ex-champ, but he has more than just a fight on his hand when the opposition unveils its secret weapon.

programme.desc: Bobby and Tony’s friendship is on the line when they become embroiled in a hilarious love triangle and attempt to outdo each other in vying for the affection of a beautiful young lady.

programme.desc: Becker takes a stab at being social by having a dinner party.

programme.desc: A dad finds out that parenting is harder than he thought after his wife goes back to work and he's left at home to take care of the kids.
